name: ID
description: Unique identifier for the resource record.

name: Title
description: To provide the user with the name of the resource. The title is the most prominent metadata field that users see when browsing or scanning search results. Titles should include place names and dates when available. The ideal sequence is 'Topic of Layer: Place, Year.'

name: Alternative Title
description: To provide the user with another title if needed. This could be for a secondary or original title or subtitle.

name: Description
description: To provide the user with a summary of the resource. At a minimum, this is a reiteration of the title in sentence format. Other relevant information, such as data creation methods, data sources, and special licenses, may also be included. This field is the second-most prominent value that users see when searching or browsing for items.
example: This polygon shapefile represents boundaries of election districts in New York City. It was harvested from the NYC Open Data Portal.

name: Language
description: The language of the resource content. Use ISO 639-2 language codes (e.g., 'eng' for English, 'spa' for Spanish).

name: Display Note
description: To highlight additional information about a resource, such as warnings or tips for using the data. Prefix the string with 'Danger:', 'Info:', 'Tip:', or 'Warning:' to specify the type of note. Text in this field is prominently displayed in a shaded box just after the title.
example: Info: This is an archived copy of the data held at UW-Madison.

name: B1G Language
description: Big Ten Academic Alliance specific language field.

name: Creator
description: The person or organization responsible for creating the resource content.

name: Creator ID
description: Unique identifier for the creator.

name: Publisher
description: The person or organization responsible for making the resource available.

name: Provider
description: To clarify which organization holds the resource or acts as the custodian for the metadata record. This field can be any string value. However, if the value corresponds to the name of an SVG icon in GeoBlacklight, the icon will display next to the title.

name: Resource Class
description: High-level classification of the resource type. Controlled vocabulary with values: Collections, Datasets, Imagery, Maps, Web services, Websites, Other.

name: Resource Type
description: Specific type of the resource. Can include Library of Congress Cartographic Genres (for scanned maps) or OpenGeoMetadata community terms (for geospatial data).

name: Subject
description: Topic or subject matter of the resource.

name: Theme
description: High-level thematic category of the resource. Can include values like 'Agriculture', 'Boundaries', 'Climate', 'Economy', 'Environment', 'Health', 'Imagery', 'Inland Waters', 'Location', 'Oceans', 'Society', 'Transportation', 'Utilities'.

name: Keyword
description: Keywords or tags that describe the resource content.

name: Local Collection
description: Local collection or repository information.

name: Temporal Coverage
description: Time period covered by the resource content.

name: Date Issued
description: Date when the resource was published or made available.

name: Index Year
description: Year used for indexing and temporal filtering of the resource.

name: Date Range
description: Range of dates covered by the resource content.

name: Spatial Coverage
description: Geographic area covered by the resource content.

name: Bounding Box
description: Geographic bounding box coordinates in the format 'minX, minY, maxX, maxY'.

name: Geometry
description: Geometric representation of the resource extent in WKT (Well-Known Text) format.

name: Centroid
description: Center point coordinates of the resource extent in the format 'latitude,longitude'.

name: GeoNames
description: GeoNames identifiers associated with the resource.

name: Conforms to
description: Standards or specifications that the resource conforms to.

name: Spatial Resolution in Meters
description: Spatial resolution of the resource in meters.

name: Spatial Resolution as Text
description: Spatial resolution of the resource as text description.

name: Extent
description: Spatial or temporal extent of the resource.

name: Georeferenced
description: Indicates whether the resource has been georeferenced.

name: Provenance Statement
description: Statement about the origin and history of the resource.

name: Source Platform
description: Software application or coding framework of the platform to be harvested from.

name: Endpoint URL
description: Queryable address of the API or HTML page to harvest from.

name: Endpoint Description
description: Type of endpoint

name: Supported Metadata Schema
description: The metadata schema available for the resource
example: ISO 19139; Dublin Core; FGDC; MODS; DCAT 1.1

name: Accrual Method
description: General workflow for accessioning the resources
example: Manual entry; Scripted harvest; System export

name: Was Generated By
description: Specific workflow for accessioning the resources

name: Accrual Periodicity
description: Frequency with which items are added to a collection.

name: Date Accessioned
description: Date when the resource was added to the collection.

name: Date Retired
description: Date when the resource was retired or removed from active use.

name: Status
description: Current status of the resource.

name: Publication State
description: Publication status of the resource (e.g., 'published', 'draft').

name: Code
description: Code or classification system identifier.

name: Identifier
description: Additional identifiers for the resource.

name: WxS Identifier
description: Web Coverage Service (WCS), Web Feature Service (WFS), or Web Map Service (WMS) identifier.

name: Tags
description: Additional tags or labels for the resource.

name: Access Rights
description: To clarify to the user if the resource is public (any user can access) or restricted (a user will need to log in to some kind of authentication protocol). Only one of two values are allowed: Public or Restricted.

name: Rights
description: Rights and permissions associated with the resource.

name: License
description: License terms under which the resource is available.

name: Rights Holder
description: Person or organization that holds rights to the resource.

name: Suppressed Record
description: Indicates whether the record is suppressed from public view.

name: Child Record
description: Indicates whether this is a child record.

name: Mediator
description: Intermediary organization or service.

name: Access
description: Access method or protocol for the resource.

name: File Size
description: Size of the resource file(s).

name: B1G Image
description: Big Ten Academic Alliance specific image field.

name: Format
description: File format or medium of the resource. Can include values like 'Shapefile', 'GeoJSON', 'Geodatabase', 'PDF', 'TIFF', 'GeoPackage', etc.

name: Member Of
description: Collections or groups that this resource belongs to.

name: Is Part Of
description: Larger resource or collection that this resource is part of.

name: Source
description: Original source of the resource data.

name: Is Version Of
description: Original resource that this is a version of.

name: Replaces
description: Resources that this resource replaces.

name: Is Replaced By
description: Resources that replace this resource.

name: Relation
description: Related resources or references.

name: In Series
description: Series that this resource belongs to.
